title: Mother of four murdered
description: ASLA PARK - A mother of four has been...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"Breaking News","html":"Breaking News"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"ASLA PARK - A mother of four has been brutally murdered in Asla Park, Mossel Bay.","html":"ASLA PARK - A mother of four has been brutally murdered in Asla Park, Mossel Bay."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The body of Khanya Beauty Tshoba (40), also known as Nitty, was found on Saturday 11 May in New Rest Endlovini.","html":"The body of Khanya Beauty Tshoba (40), also known as Nitty, was found on Saturday 11 May in New Rest Endlovini."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Police spokesperson Warrant Officer Kappie Kapp told the Mossel Bay Advertiser Tshoba was declared dead by paramedics on the scene."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"A prayer service was held for her in Luthuli Street on Tuesday.","html":"A prayer service was held for her in Luthuli Street on Tuesday."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"It is alleged that Tshoba was raped and strangled."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"She will be buried on Saturday in East London.","html":"She will be buried on Saturday in East London."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Anyone who can assist the police with information can contact the investigating officer from the KwaNonqaba police station at 082 334 7566.","html":"Anyone who can assist the police with information can contact the investigating officer from the KwaNonqaba police station at 082 334 7566."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
